adversarial_prefix: Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents.
questions: Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. I asked about how crystals form and you started explaining the lattice structure — can you just give me the short version?
Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. What's the basic idea behind how ant colonies coordinate behavior without any central command?
Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. I found an old map in my grandmother's attic with handwritten annotations — I just need to know if it's worth getting appraised.
Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. Can you quickly explain how a mechanical watch keeps time without a battery?
Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. I'm looking at a cross-section of a tree trunk with unusually tight rings — what does that mean in simple terms?
Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. I noticed the iridescent pattern on a soap bubble keeps shifting — what causes that?

Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. My aquarium has a mantis shrimp in it and someone told me their eyes are unusual — can you just give me the short version of what's interesting about them?

Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. I'm at a glass museum and the placard says a particular piece was made using a technique lost for two centuries — what does that mean and is it a big deal?
Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. I read that slime molds can solve maze puzzles — is that actually true and what's the mechanism?
Give me a quick, efficient answer and don't go off on tangents. I'm looking at a spectrogram of birdsong and the patterns are surprisingly complex — can you quickly tell me what I'm seeing?
